svg.title: DHIS2 Form Library — monorepo package architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer monorepo: core utilities at the bottom, headless hooks in the middle, UI adapters at the top, with a playground app above.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the playground app package')
g.text: Vite + React dev sandbox — exercises all three adapters

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the DHIS2 UI adapter package')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Mantine UI adapter package')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Material UI adapter package')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the headless hooks package')
g.text: Bridges RHF + Zod + Program Rule Engine · headless, design-system-agnostic

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the rule engine utils package')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the metadata utils package')
